name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily: Weekend Edition
body:
Everything White House for your weekend. |

**WEEKEND EDITION**

President Donald J. Trump's Weekly Address to the Nation
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7aa151c13c9d87d8d45d4a33ef8164d4ebbddc1bf8d7fb35641bb6b7badb4fb9d1f53b55c2bf01659b180287b2a183a3824c07a6c7a63702)

**THIS WEEK'S TOP STORIES**
Statement by President Trump on Syria.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7aa151c13c9d87d84313aad0012f6152e3d1ba418085952bba565a811fe8f53a74749fac05821553d5fed1db605e32c63fc8c5da1cd83788)
President Donald J. Trump Congratulates Judge Neil M. Gorsuch on his Historic Confirmation.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7aa151c13c9d87d87337d6ff4f9e34299874ef22a22623d3b838cdbfa3313db62c4f191c460ec23574e52361b8802e8098a81edcf5d9160b)
A Proclamation by President Donald J. Trump Honoring the Memory of John Glenn.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7aa151c13c9d87d8ca8e8566ebb89d00326e4e563e6aa1c30781ac24a0abaf96fad31e56fc5742efa7a1936b38564d00e1eb9130f29d18c6)

**IN CASE YOU MISSED IT**
White House Announces 2017 Spring Garden Tours.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7aa151c13c9d87d8b2e82f63d7d9904165b152f58ae7015317319ddb651676bb7eef7de2e66d569f263f6df096d3079928fd02bb390be531)
VIDEO: President Trump and the First Lady have dinner with President of the People's Republic of China Xi Jinping and Madame Peng Liyuan.
[Watch Video](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7aa151c13c9d87d8bc7bc1ff921fb4c948c5c587fe3b1c07c4ae760547c18bc18374129dd4f61dd340b8e0001b580cb1d87822ffd54cdb13)
First Lady Melania Trump visits Excel Academy Public Charter School with Queen Rania of Jordan.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7aa151c13c9d87d829396a7a4f43299cabfbc3189a7eb894dcf8c6f5ff530e55ac9e57d6220a562e7dcfc19aafb19eb183c938bdbd07cbbf)
President Donald J. Trump Signs H.J.Res. 69, H.J.Res. 83, H.R. 1228, S.J.Res. 34 into Law.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7aa151c13c9d87d80f4eda1fd8868654b1562658c85f1ada8397da8dd94f781bb24f05133340be6cc99c214998441d57719470ce021137b5)

**UPCOMING EVENTS**
**April 17th:** President Trump and the First Lady host the 139th Annual White House Easter Egg Roll on the South Lawn
**April 22nd - 23rd:** The White House grounds open for 2017 Spring Garden Tours
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7aa151c13c9d87d8b2e82f63d7d9904165b152f58ae7015317319ddb651676bb7eef7de2e66d569f263f6df096d3079928fd02bb390be531)

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7aa151c13c9d87d8e8a8a3120777bfde9c4df5b1cf8f59f600b45e944fe002a5ac5f3c785e33fdaf1397587652b5f4e7f0af6f6b1f2d9031) [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7aa151c13c9d87d82999808f79b6ea1a39b067690558f73a8f5d1806377ec30380b33e3e38eb852f15913898bf559d667602d3662048f4ae)[Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d43bea9c65d51e69d731253c32d486f3612ac3c6cd6057027ec33ecf38b21409f9f4dbfff6cff90a8e36509ddf5a5a76dc)
clean_body: Everything White House for your weekend. | WEEKEND EDITION President Donald J. Trump's Weekly Address to the Nation THIS WEEK'S TOP STORIES Statement by President Trump on Syria. President Donald J. Trump Congratulates Judge Neil M. Gorsuch on his Historic Confirmation. A Proclamation by President Donald J. Trump Honoring the Memory of John Glenn. IN CASE YOU MISSED IT White House Announces 2017 Spring Garden Tours. VIDEO: President Trump and the First Lady have dinner with President of the People's Republic of China Xi Jinping and Madame Peng Liyuan. First Lady Melania Trump visits Excel Academy Public Charter School with Queen Rania of Jordan. President Donald J. Trump Signs H.J.Res. 69, H.J.Res. 83, H.R. 1228, S.J.Res. 34 into Law. name: =?UTF-8?Q?Newt=20Gingrich?=
subject: re: defending the President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Democrats are trying to fill my seat, can I count on your support? |

Friend, I know your inbox has been flooded with messages about the special election that’s being held in GA-6 on April 18, but I wanted to touch base with you before Election Day. The Democrats are doing everything they can to win this seat for the first time since 1979 and reverse all the progress President Trump has accomplished in his first few months. They’ve brought in big names like Nancy Pelosi and even have liberal Hollywood celebrities on the ground to campaign for their cherry-picked liberal candidate. But, I’m counting on your support today to keep GA-6 in Republican hands. This is our first big test, Friend. We need to keep this seat red and protect the president. With just 10 days until the first big election of Donald Trump’s term, please contribute just $1 to combat the MILLIONS that Democrats are rushing to turn Georgia blue. Contribute $1 Let’s make sure we put a conservative, Pro-Trump voice for GA-6 in the House. Thank you for your support of our party and our President, Next Gingrich Former Speaker of the House Former Representative of GA-6

Contribute $1

name: Democrats.org
subject: Let's send Republicans a message they can't ignore
body:
Senate Republicans have gone too far. **Pitch in whatever you can to help Democrats take back the Senate in 2018:

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c926/4067b0a/2ecf301f9/7e739d77/2541933207/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Ready-for-2018-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170408_dnc_nd&source=em_20170408_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170408_dnc_nd")**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c926/4067b0a/2ecf301f9/7e739d7a/2541933207/VEsHBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170408_dnc_nd&source=em_20170408_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170408_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c926/4067b0a/2ecf301f9/7e739d7b/2541933207/VEsHBg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170408_dnc_nd&source=em_20170408_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170408_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c926/4067b0a/2ecf301f9/7e739d78/2541933207/VEsHAQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170408_dnc_nd&source=em_20170408_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170408_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c926/4067b0a/2ecf301f9/7e739d79/2541933207/VEsHAA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170408_dnc_nd&source=em_20170408_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170408_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor
subject: Jill Vogel Breaks 2/3 in Southwest Virginia Straw Poll Victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
April 8th, 2017

**PEARISBURG, VA - Last night**, State Senator Jill Vogel, Republican candidate for lieutenant governor, won the overwhelming support of Southwest Virginia Republicans in a straw poll held at the Giles County GOP's annual Stafford-Morris Dinner, winning 68% in a field of three and breaking the 2/3 threshold for the first time in the race.
"We have made Southwest Virginia a priority in our campaign and I am honored to have the strong support and confidence of Southwest Virginia Republicans," said Senator Jill Vogel. "Voters across Southwest Virginia are ready for a return to economic growth. With new policies to make Virginia number one for jobs, we can attract new businesses to the region."
This victory follows a number of other clear victories in straw polls, which placed Jill at [64% in Fairfax](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001w1tjJl6L3S0nGqH2yv98Lw7IpGeppE52axVcpYG8Nt-SAeAKXvPob4yd4Q0qrTV3c71XMEwlYtQ0UTY7FkkI9kfKQ_eLfy7uoHgJ9tYaybcxByAVqAgRDm8bOxbvgLWkZtkTJDykfLo-xrnWUU-xBnGyunhBC0Wa8iwDprGQwsbWc5akpWoeUAN5L_FcfQe2sXoJiz0EB6kPeCr40iLztHW9N1RLTJ0WYP_mEQFeqbBWxCozPpEWzA==&c=ma9fNn48ls9NTMw5S92pbeiUUr1ajdgeqBgJfuf_b3RSvoI4JwoEUw==&ch=60YjRbSCfYNj95_9WaiBpO-x6SvwFELkmqh1qSca6DH9dWy4_FOjlw==) and [57% in Prince William](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001w1tjJl6L3S0nGqH2yv98Lw7IpGeppE52axVcpYG8Nt-SAeAKXvPobyyC3wPjJEF802M3DIFiH6b4BpW2h0oGTyRfqwt9SEt08xy2VfrTyL74suD6jNTIv3iamEusZ9pQ1njXs5ov8hN3pfqW0zmQdRylDWJKz5OuJyPYsWoT7CRCVS2oOkQpQ8zcyK_Kv4WC_rtnlRMIQvkslcbmIHoISkcptzCgo_KWxW8XZcw-BpaXCgfFyMsQ43xvyGgl-D4JK0woV7u2OqMCLurTJb1sk9I2SIxdLtI3&c=ma9fNn48ls9NTMw5S92pbeiUUr1ajdgeqBgJfuf_b3RSvoI4JwoEUw==&ch=60YjRbSCfYNj95_9WaiBpO-x6SvwFELkmqh1qSca6DH9dWy4_FOjlw==). [Vogel also led the field in a recent poll of likely voters](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001w1tjJl6L3S0nGqH2yv98Lw7IpGeppE52axVcpYG8Nt-SAeAKXvPob4yd4Q0qrTV3tRP9pgI9n-RKlGZP8mWCuPB_MR2aPlyeG5Mamy8wpGrTnx1Ekcql3SWlDIFVi2UQKtqNNOsH1uy2dVZgCnQXISSivG77Zuat6ZY2rCQV_i4uB7dTQ7CQfOep51Dc6mih5pdVjYlIrblOeFlWKdtXDfUrQYoRfvCOZjhxZRr0yRaC3Oass2HHWGwzyVrW0mq1LyMMRcU4gv8BMZq5B98YcoEN50z3ZIPMHlQYUodnVzwClMol0huDHN0Ndlsqs9ttC8Tb-HVIMXN1Z1wAuLUheEjEgzeousNQ-sdLP_7ouyc=&c=ma9fNn48ls9NTMw5S92pbeiUUr1ajdgeqBgJfuf_b3RSvoI4JwoEUw==&ch=60YjRbSCfYNj95_9WaiBpO-x6SvwFELkmqh1qSca6DH9dWy4_FOjlw==) conducted by Christopher Newport University's Watson Center for Public Policy.
"Tonight's victory clearly demonstrates that Jill's positive, conservative message is resonating from Northern Virginia to Southwest, and everywhere in between," noted Vogel's Campaign Manager Pat Trueman. "Surpassing two-thirds in this poll is a clear sign of the momentum which has been building behind Jill's campaign for months. In the last ten weeks, we look forward to continue sharing Jill's vision of economic growth and personal liberty across the Commonwealth."

Full Results are as Follows:**Jill Vogel - 68%**
**Glenn Davis - 24%**
**Bryce Reeves - 8%**###
---
| |
---
| Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186

---

"We have made Southwest Virginia a priority in our campaign and I am honored to have the strong support and confidence of Southwest Virginia Republicans," said Senator Jill Vogel. "Voters across Southwest Virginia are ready for a return to economic growth. With new policies to make Virginia number one for jobs, we can attract new businesses to the region." This victory follows a number of other clear victories in straw polls, which placed Jill at == and ==. == conducted by Christopher Newport University's Watson Center for Public Policy. "Tonight's victory clearly demonstrates that Jill's positive, conservative message is resonating from Northern Virginia to Southwest, and everywhere in between," noted Vogel's Campaign Manager Pat Trueman. "Surpassing two-thirds in this poll is a clear sign of the momentum which has been building behind Jill's campaign for months. In the last ten weeks, we look forward to continue sharing Jill's vision of economic growth and personal liberty across the Commonwealth." Full Results are as Follows:Jill Vogel - 68% Glenn Davis - 24% Bryce Reeves - 8%### | | | Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186 | Follow Jill on Facebook and Twitter for Campaign Updates == == | | | Vogel for Virginia | 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100, Warrenton, VA 20186 | | Sent by mailto:info@vogelforvirginia.com in collaboration with |

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd60/2a380d31/15add936/fefe55/255970495/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd60/2a380d31/15add936/fefe55/255970495/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Team, the special election for the 6th congressional district in Georgia is just 10 days away, and Republicans are worried that they'll lose this seat to Democrat Jon Ossoff.
This race is incredibly close, and shady outside groups just dumped in $2.2 MILLION to defeat Jon and elect another rubberstamp for Donald Trump and Steve Bannon.
Jon is exactly the leader that Georgia needs, and with the GOP giving it their all to hang on to this seat, we HAVE to raise $7,000 for him before the weekend is over.
[**Please, donate $3 or more now to help push Jon Ossoff to victory and add one more Democrat to our firewall against the dangerous Trump/Bannon agenda.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd60/2a380d31/15add936/fefe56/255970495/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQwOF9Pc3NvZmYxX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170408_Ossoff1_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Jon Ossoff and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd60/2a380d31/15add936/fefe57/255970495/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQwOF9Pc3NvZmYxX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFTQjlmUT09IjoiMyJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170408_Ossoff1_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd60/2a380d31/15add936/fefe50/255970495/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQwOF9Pc3NvZmYxX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFpQjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170408_Ossoff1_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd60/2a380d31/15add936/fefe51/255970495/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQwOF9Pc3NvZmYxX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVF5QjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170408_Ossoff1_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd60/2a380d31/15add936/fefe56/255970495/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQwOF9Pc3NvZmYxX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170408_Ossoff1_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Team Maggie is no stranger to tight races. Our Senate race in New Hampshire came down to just _1,017 votes_ , so we know that every single dollar we raise -- every PENNY -- can be the difference between winning and losing.
This race will determine whether we elect one more fighter against the Trump/Bannon agenda or whether we hand Trump and Bannon one more vote to move their dangerous policies forward. **So, team? We REALLY cannot afford to lose.**
[**Give $3 or more now to help elect Jon Ossoff and make sure that the GOP knows that we will resist their out-of-touch priorities.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd60/2a380d31/15add936/fefe56/255970495/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQwOF9Pc3NvZmYxX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170408_Ossoff1_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
There's not much time left, so thanks for stepping up.
-- Team Maggie
